# Siva Electricals Constructions

> Siva Electricals Constructions is a trusted electrical and plumbing contractor based in Adimali, Idukki district, Kerala, India. We deliver safe, code-compliant electrical and plumbing work for homes and businesses across Adimali, Munnar, Thodupuzha and the wider Idukki district, with certified technicians and 24/7 emergency support.

## Key facts

- **Business name:** Siva Electricals Constructions (also known as "Siva Electricals")
- **Industry:** Electrical contractor and plumber (residential, commercial & industrial)
- **Location:** Achuthamenon Road, Adimali, Idukki, Kerala 685561, India
- **Service area:** Adimali, Munnar, Thodupuzha, Kattappana, Nedumkandam, Rajakkad, Devikulam and the wider Idukki district, Kerala
- **Phone:** +91 94472 94319, +91 95622 94319
- **WhatsApp:** +91 94472 94319
- **Email:** contact@sivaelectricals.co.in
- **Website:** https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 8:00 AM–6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM–4:00 PM, Sun emergency only. 24/7 emergency support available.
- **Languages:** English, Malayalam

## Services

- [Electrical Services](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/electrical-services): Complete wiring, panel, and safety solutions for homes and businesses.
- [Wiring & Rewiring](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/wiring-rewiring): Safe, efficient wiring for new builds, remodels, and old systems.
- [Panel Upgrades](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/panel-upgrades): Upgrade electrical panels to support modern load demands safely.
- [Smart Home Installation](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/smart-home-installation): Integrated control of lighting, comfort, and security.
- [Lighting Design](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/lighting-design): Practical and aesthetic indoor/outdoor lighting.
- [Plumbing Solutions](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/plumbing-solutions): End-to-end plumbing installation, repair, and maintenance.
- [Leak Detection & Repair](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/leak-detection-repair): Pinpoint hidden leaks and repair quickly.
- [Pipe Installation](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/pipe-installation): Durable piping for water supply and drainage.
- [Water Heater Services](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/water-heater-services): Install, repair, and maintain tank and tankless systems.
- [Drain Cleaning](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/drain-cleaning): Clear slow or blocked drains and restore flow.
- [Maintenance Contracts](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/maintenance-contracts): Scheduled preventive checks (AMC).
- [Safety Inspections](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/safety-inspections): Compliance-focused electrical and plumbing audits.
- [Commercial Contracts](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services/commercial-contracts): Long-term execution for business sites.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/): Overview of services and the company.
- [Services](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/services): Full list of electrical and plumbing services.
- [About](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/about): Company background and values.
- [Contact](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/contact): Phone, email, address, hours, and map.
- [Get a Quote](https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/quote): Request a free, no-obligation estimate.

## Frequently asked questions

- **Which areas do you serve?** Adimali and the wider Idukki district, including Munnar, Thodupuzha, and nearby towns.
- **Do you handle emergencies?** Yes — 24/7 support for electrical and plumbing emergencies such as power failures, short circuits, and major leaks.
- **Are technicians licensed and insured?** Yes — certified, experienced technicians following safety and code-compliance standards.
- **How do I get a quote?** Use the online form, call, or message on WhatsApp for a clear, itemised estimate.
- **Do you take small repairs and large projects?** Yes — from a single switchboard repair to full-building installations and commercial contracts.

## Contact

To book a visit or request a quote, call +91 94472 94319, email contact@sivaelectricals.co.in, or use the quote form at https://www.sivaelectricals.co.in/quote.
